mapper.select: SELECT mo.id, mo.eq_id, e.eq_name, mo.alert_event_id, ae.alert_level, ae.sensor_name AS alert_sensor_name, mo.order_type, mo.priority, mo.status, mo.title, mo.description, mo.assignee, mo.action_taken, mo.created_at, mo.started_at, mo.completed_at FROM maint_order mo JOIN equipment e ON mo.eq_id = e.eq_id LEFT JOIN alert_event ae ON mo.alert_event_id = ae.id WHERE mo.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO maint_order (eq_id, alert_event_id, order_type, priority, title, description) VALUES (#{eqId}, #{alertEventId}, #{orderType}, #{priority}, #{title}, #{description})
